opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My legs broke out overnight in loads of painful, itchy little whiteheads after I shaved, and I'm really scared it's turning into a serious infection or something drug-resistant.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: They came up suddenly and it looks awful and it's sore, and I panicked reading online that it could be a bad staph infection.

symptom_narrative.onset: came up overnight, about a day ago, right after I shaved my legs
symptom_narrative.character: heaps of tiny raised red spots with little whiteheads, and a lot of them have a hair right in the middle
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: itchy and a bit sore, more annoying and scary than really painful
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both my lower legs, only where I shaved
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it appeared, worse when clothing rubs on it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: my leggings rubbing on them, and I put a thick body butter over the area which didn't help
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: just the spots really, some have popped and left a tiny crust
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: not really, first time it's been this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm avoiding walking around too much because the rubbing hurts

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a thick body butter I rubbed over the rash

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; had just shaved and put on tight workout leggings before this came up

objective_data_offered.value: dozens of tiny 1-3mm red spots with a whitehead on top, each one has a hair coming out of the middle, and the skin in between the spots looks totally normal; a few have burst and crusted over
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-shown over video; lighting and camera quality limit assessment of depth and any deeper lump

objective_data_offered.value: only on both lower legs where I shaved, not spreading up my thighs and no big red patches joining up
no fever, I feel completely normal in myself, temperature felt normal
